title: Open-label phase I/II clinical trial of SARS-CoV-2 receptor binding domain-tetanus toxoid conjugate vaccine (FINLAY-FR-2) in combination with receptor binding domain-protein vaccine (FINLAY-FR-1A) in children.
ehr_evidence: None; the study is a clinical trial.
summary: A phase I/II open-label clinical trial evaluating the safety and immunogenicity of a heterologous SARS-CoV-2 vaccine scheme (FINLAY-FR-2 and FINLAY-FR-1A) in children aged 3-18 in Havana, Cuba.
key_findings: Local pain was the only adverse event with frequency > 10% and was not serious.
Two doses of FINLAY-FR-2 followed by a third dose of FINLAY-FR-1A increased the humoral immune response in all children.
Neutralizing titers were measured against Alpha, Delta, Beta, and Omicron variants.
population: 350 children 3-18 years old in Havana, Cuba
